ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer */,
  "is_senior_citizen" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a senior citizen */,
  "has_partner" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a partner */,
  "has_child" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has children */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segmentation of the customer (e.g., VIP, Regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "monthly_spending" REAL /* Monthly spending for the plan */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total spent for the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "contract_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the contract */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Applicable discount rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method (encrypted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_history" (
  "usage_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan */,
  "has_phone_service" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has phone service */,
  "has_multiple_phone_numbers" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has multiple phone numbers */,
  "has_internet_service" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has internet service */,
  "has_online_security_service" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has online security service */,
  "has_online_backup" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has online backup */,
  "has_device_protection" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has device protection */,
  "has_tech_support_access" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has tech support access */,
  "has_online_tv" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has online TV */,
  "has_movie_subscription" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has movie subscription */,
  "monthly_usage" REAL /* Total monthly usage */,
  "data_usage" REAL /* Data usage in GB */,
  "call_minutes" REAL /* Total call minutes */,
  "text_messages" INTEGER /* Number of text messages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_history_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., One year, Two year, Month-to-month) */,
  "is_billing_paperless" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is billed paperlessly */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churns" (
  "churn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date the customer churned */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("churn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the representative works in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager oversees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard entry */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was generated */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate for the date */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the date */,
  "customer_count" INTEGER /* Total number of customers for the date */,
  "average_revenue_per_user" REAL /* Average revenue per user for the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was measured */,
  "satisfaction_rate" REAL /* Satisfaction rate for the date */,
  "resolved_issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues resolved by the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_performance_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES customer_service_representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manager_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was measured */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate for the date */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Percentage growth in revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manager_performance_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)
